rationale: The pair is not an obvious mention-only citation: the citing paper frames retelling as strategic word-of-mouth curation driven by communicator motives (guide/persuade, felt relative knowledge), while the cited paper provides a mechanism for how communication context changes what people share (audience size via self-/other-focus). Given this direct conceptual overlap on sender-versus-recipient motives in transmission choices, it is plausibly a theory/mechanism source and should be reviewed in second-stage judgment.
